await main();

2026-04-06T19:40:38.3526888Z   debug: false
2026-04-06T19:40:38.3527280Z   user-agent: actions/github-script

2026-04-06T19:40:38.3529049Z env:
2026-04-06T19:40:38.3534846Z   GH_AW_MODEL_MULTIPLIERS: {
  "version": "1",
  "description": "Effective Tokens (ET) computation data per the gh-aw Effective Tokens Specification v0.2.0. Token class weights are applied first to normalize across token classes, then the per-model multiplier scales the result relative to the reference model.",
  "reference_model": "claude-sonnet-4.5",
  "token_class_weights": {
    "input": 1.0,
    "cached_input": 0.1,
    "output": 4.0,
    "reasoning": 4.0,
    "cache_write": 1.0
  },
  "multipliers": {
    "claude-haiku-4.5": 0.1,
    "claude-3-5-haiku": 0.1,
    "claude-3-haiku": 0.1,
